posts.text:
Tonight on Life, Liberty & Levin, 8pm Eastern on Fox. Set your DVR if you can’t watch live!
foxnews.com/video/6390943056…

Newsbusters has the goods on NPR. Check it out:

newsbusters.org/blogs/nb/tim…

Poor Megyn Kelly.  An emotionally unhinged, lewd, and petulant wreck.  She’s completely revealed and destroyed herself. She’s everything people say she is, but much worse.  Never an intelligent, thoughtful, or substantive comment. Utterly toxic.

Seems like a mentlly ill traitor


Laura Loomer (@LauraLoomer)

🚨 EXCLUSIVE 🚨 

Today, IRGC media accounts on X are quoting Tucker Carlson to push the Iranian regime’s talking points during the war between the US and Iran. 

Fars News Agency is affiliated with the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps. Today they posted a photo of @TuckerCarlson and his statement in which he said control of the war with Iran has slipped out of America’s hands, and how Tucker believes the US under President Trump @PO

CNN representing the Iranian regime?


Brent Scher (@BrentScher)

This is an insane story, and it gets crazier. The Telegraph took down the image of CNN officials shaking hands with Iranian officials after @newsbusters wrote about it.



— https://nitter.net/BrentScher/status/2032839588377432243#m

Sunday on Fox at 8 PM eastern on Life, Liberty & Levin. Set your DVR as well! See you then!

Video

My opening statement on tonight’s Life, Liberty & Levin

foxnews.com/video/6390949304…

Josh Shapiro is another phony who is far more radical in service to the far left and Islamists than the media reports

foxnews.com/media/bill-maher…

That’s her point, you moron


Megyn Kelly (@megynkelly)

Dear @GoldsteinBrooke - I regret to inform you that this shit doesn’t work on me anymore. Take care.



— https://nitter.net/megynkelly/status/2032878528463606210#m
See you in soon - 8 PM eastern on Life, Liberty & Levin on Fox! If you can’t watch live you can DVR the show. Don’t miss it!

If true, he's taking a page out of FDR's book.  FDR threatened licensed media outlets throughout his presidency.  Just saying.

aol.com/articles/fcc-chair-t…

Our David and our Ambassador are great and courageous patriots


J S Levin (@jaslevin1216)

And thank you for taking the time to write this shout out, @AbrahamHamadeh!! @USAmbIsrael, @davidamilstein, and @usembassyjlm are there to serve the American people for sure, 100%!



— https://nitter.net/jaslevin1216/status/2032934705046118866#m
